summary: MYU AI Companion Architecture Testing Complete. Backend: 24/24 tests passed. Frontend: Fixed critical bug (event object passed to sendMessage), all UI tests pass. The 6-layer MYU architecture is working correctly with orchestrator, cost control, location (geohash-4), intent classification, tool routing, and LLM service.

bugs_fixed_by_tester.bug: React error 'Objects are not valid as a React child' when sending chat messages
bugs_fixed_by_tester.fix: Changed onClick={sendMessage} to onClick={() => sendMessage()} and added type check in sendMessage function to prevent event objects from being treated as text
bugs_fixed_by_tester.impact: Chat page crashed after sending any message, making the entire MYU chat unusable

critical_code_review_comments: MOCKED APIs: cinema_finder, restaurant_finder, and weather tools return MOCK data - need real API integration for production
Cost tracking is working correctly - all requests stay under $0.0035 budget
context_for_next_testing_agent: MYU AI companion architecture has been fully tested. Key findings: 1) All MYU API endpoints working (/api/myu/chat, /api/myu/location, /api/myu/location/confirm, /api/myu/tool/cinema, /api/myu/tool/restaurants, /api/myu/tool/weather, /api/myu/tool/merchants, /api/myu/costs/{request_id}, /api/myu/history, /api/myu/new-session, /api/myu/tasks, /api/myu/tasks/{task_id}). 2) Intent classification working via keywords (greeting, wallet, cinema, weather, restaurant, tasks, etc.). 3) Greeting uses static responses (no LLM). 4) Location-based queries use geohash-4 encoding and city confirmation flow. 5) Cost tracking per request is logging correctly. 6) Cinema/restaurant/weather tools return MOCK data. 7) Wallet/merchant/tasks/notifications tools query real MongoDB. 8) Frontend MYU chat page at /myu route. 9) Action buttons (confirm_city, navigate, create_task, suggest_merchant) render and work correctly.

verified_features.POST /api/myu/chat - greeting: PASS - Static response, no LLM call
verified_features.POST /api/myu/chat - city mismatch: PASS - Double city confirmation with actions
verified_features.POST /api/myu/tool/merchants: PASS - Returns real merchant data from DB
verified_features.GET /api/myu/costs/{request_id}: PASS - Returns cost details, all under $0.0035
verified_features.Intent - wallet keywords: PASS - saldo, quanto ho, wallet, balance
verified_features.Frontend - MyuChatPage UI: PASS - Chat input, send button, messages, actions
verified_features.Frontend - action buttons: PASS - Render and respond to clicks

mocked_apis_note: Cinema finder, restaurant finder, and weather tools return MOCK data. Real API integration needed for production.
